description: A movie recommendation service that interfaces with the TMDb API to search, retrieve details, and discover popular movies.

tools.name: get_movies
tools.description: Search for movie suggestions from TMDb based on a keyword matching movie titles or descriptions.

keyword.description: Search keyword to match against movie titles or descriptions.

limit.description: Maximum number of movie results to return.

movies.description: List of movies matching the search keyword.

movie_id.description: The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.

title.description: The official title of the movie.

overview.description: A brief synopsis or description of the movie's plot.

release_date.description: The theatrical release date of the movie in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: get_movie_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific movie including cast, genres, and ratings.

movie_id.description: The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.
The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.

title.description: The official title of the movie.

overview.description: A brief synopsis or description of the movie's plot.

release_date.description: The theatrical release date of the movie in YYYY-MM-DD format.

duration.description: The runtime of the movie in minutes.

genres.description: List of genre categories the movie belongs to.

vote_average.description: The average user rating score for the movie on TMDb.

views.description: The total number of views or popularity count for the movie.

actors.description: List of main actors appearing in the movie.

tools.name: get_popular_movies
tools.description: Retrieve a list of currently popular movies from TMDb, with optional filtering by rating, views, or release date.

filter.description: Sorting criteria for popularity ranking. Accepts 'vote_average' for rating-based or 'views' for view count-based sorting.

date.description: Filter movies released on or after this date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

limit.description: Maximum number of movie results to return. Defaults to 5 if not specified.

movies.description: List of popular movies matching the specified filter criteria.

movie_id.description: The unique identifier of the movie from TMDb.

title.description: The official title of the movie.

overview.description: A brief synopsis or description of the movie's plot.

release_date.description: The theatrical release date of the movie in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vote_average.description: The average user rating score for the movie on TMDb.

views.description: The total number of views or popularity count for the movie.

actors.description: List of main actors appearing in the movie.
